questionHtml: A container is filled with 1 mole of helium (molar mass 4 g mol−1) and 1 mole of neon (molar mass 20 g mol−1). Compare the average kinetic energy of helium atoms to that of neon atoms.
markschemeHtml:
temperature is the same for both gases ✓

«average» kinetic energy is the same «because Ek=32kT  OR  Ek depends on T only» ✓


Award [1 max] for a bald statement that kinetic energy is the same.
